Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Baldor Electric Company To Produce Its Custodian(S) Of Records, Person(S) Most Knowledgeable And Documents At Deposition And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John B. Goldstein for plaintiff and moving party: Emile Geron and Mary Geron

No other appearance was stated. HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Emile Geron and Mary Geron's motion to compel defendant Baldor Electric Company to produce the custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition is Granted. The parties are to meet and confer as to the scope of the depositions. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Compliance by March 30, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
